name: Transcare Wheelchair Trnsprtn
recent_news: No M&A or news found; appears to be a micro NEMT/wheelchair-van operator in northeast MS. Distinct from Transcare Ambulance Service of Alcorn County (Corinth, MS, (662) 331-5153), which is a separate larger ambulance provider.
fit_notes: Poor Summit fit: micro 3-employee wheelchair-van NEMT operator with no school-bus or pupil-transport activity per source data (school=0, special_needs=1). Not a tuck-in candidate.

name: Schu Tran LLC
districts_or_customers: UCare; Benton, Cass, Mille Lacs, Sherburne, and Wright counties (MN)
recent_news: Incorporated 5/5/2006, opened 11/22/2006; Foley, MN-based; no M&A or recent news identified.
fit_notes: Poor Summit fit: independent rural MN wheelchair/NEMT micro-operator focused on Medicaid medical transport, not K-12 school-bus routes. Not a tuck-in candidate.

name: Speedy Van
districts_or_customers: Local NEMT/Medicaid in central MN (Benton/Mille Lacs/Sherburne area)
recent_news: No M&A or news identified. Note: Distinct from the larger Minneapolis-based Speedy Van LLC at speedyvanmn.com (2500 E 25th St, Minneapolis); this Oak Park, MN operator at (320) 968-7318 is a separate rural micro-operator likely affiliated with Schu-Tran in the same Oak Park/Foley area.
fit_notes: Poor Summit fit: micro rural MN NEMT/wheelchair-van operator, not a school-bus contractor (school=0 per source). Not a tuck-in candidate.

name: Helping Hands Specialized
districts_or_customers: Rowan County NC and surrounding areas; senior/disabled NEMT clientele
recent_news: No M&A or news identified; long-standing Landis, NC micro-operator listed in senior services directories.
fit_notes: Poor Summit fit: 3-employee specialized/NEMT transport firm with no apparent K-12 school-bus contracts. Not a tuck-in candidate.

name: Quality Transport
owner_or_parent: independent (Wil & Brooke Taylor, current owners; founded by Jesse & Betty Burgess 1993)
districts_or_customers: Salisbury/Rowan County NC NEMT clients; community-based medical transport
recent_news: Ownership transitioned from founders Jesse & Betty Burgess to Wil & Brooke Taylor (date not disclosed). Jesse Burgess departed Oct 2020 and was later charged with embezzlement of ~$4,200 from the company (Salisbury Post, April 2021).
fit_notes: Poor Summit fit: NEMT-only operator (vans, no school buses), already underwent ownership transition to the Taylors. Not a school-bus tuck-in target.
